creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Wed, Nov 21, 2001 at 01:13:42PM -0500, Pete Fritchman wrote:
> [cc'd to maintainer for approval]
> 
> What would you think of this patch?  The proper place to look for
> ipfw-al is ${PREFIX}, because ipfw-al is installed with this port.

I have received a similair complaint and have solved it in the
code (actually, in the Makefile). This friday I'll submit a new
port with one more problem fixed. So if you can hold this I'll fix
it and also try to get rid of the patches done in the files/
directory of the port.

Thanks for your support in this anyway :-)

Edwin
